evals.prompt: I have a FASTA file of 40 plasmid constructs I need to load into our Benchling registry. Write a script that creates each as a circular DNA sequence in folder fld_abc123 and registers it.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-benchling. Uses the benchling-sdk Python client (Benchling + ApiKeyAuth) and benchling.dna_sequences.create with DnaSequenceCreate (bases, is_circular=True, folder_id), parsing the FASTA with Bio.SeqIO, and registers entities by setting registry_id plus a naming_strategy (NEW_IDS or IDS_FROM_NAMES). Should not pass both entity_registry_id and naming_strategy together.

assertions.value: Uses benchling.dna_sequences.create and registers by setting registry_id with a naming_strategy; does not combine entity_registry_id with naming_strategy in the same create call.

evals.prompt: Can you script an audit of every container in box box_abc123 in our Benchling inventory, printing each container's name and barcode?
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-benchling. Uses benchling.containers.list(parent_storage_id=...) and iterates the paginated generator (for page in ...: for container in page) printing container.name and container.barcode, following the inventory-management capability.

assertions.value: Iterates the Benchling containers list generator page-by-page rather than assuming a flat list.

evals.prompt: I want to run a SQL query against our Benchling Data Warehouse to aggregate experimental results by schema and pull them into a Jupyter notebook for analysis.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-benchling. Routes to the Data Warehouse & Analytics capability: connect to the Benchling Data Warehouse via a standard SQL client with provided credentials, run the aggregation query, and load results into Jupyter for analysis.

evals.prompt: Automate creating a Benchling ELN entry for today's experiment and open a PCR Amplification workflow task assigned to a teammate.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-benchling. Uses benchling.entries.create_entry with EntryCreate and benchling.workflow_tasks.create with WorkflowTaskCreate (workflow_id, assignee_id, fields), covering the notebook and workflow capabilities.

assertions.value: Creates an ELN entry and a workflow task via the benchling-sdk entries and workflow_tasks services.

evals.prompt: I need to programmatically back up my LabArchives notebook as a 7z archive with all attachments and then push a Jupyter export into it as a new entry.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-labarchive. The platform is LabArchives (notebook_backup, entry_operations, Jupyter integration), not Benchling, so the LabArchives ELN skill is correct.

evals.prompt: Help me search protocols.io for a CRISPR-Cas9 protocol, create my own version with steps and materials, and publish it with a DOI.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-protocolsio. The user is managing protocols on protocols.io (search, steps/materials, DOI publishing via the protocols.io API v3), not Benchling registry/inventory/ELN data.
